stemHtml: What does the instruction "Fastair 345 reset 1240?" mean?

options.a: Fastair 345 is requested to set new code 1240.
options.b: Fastair 345 is requested to reselect assigned code 1240.
options.c: Fastair 345 is informed that radar service is terminated at time 12:40.
options.d: Fastair 345 is instructed to stop squawk 1240 immediately.
